name: solo-squad
description: A complete agency operating system for Claude Code. Six specialist squads with NEXUS cross-squad orchestration, 60+ skills, persistent client context, and context-aware hooks.

metadata.description: Combines the best of Superpowers, gstack, Compound Engineering, and Agency Agents into one unified plugin marketplace for digital agencies and solo builders.

plugins.name: engineering-squad
plugins.description: Full engineering workflow: brainstorm, plan, build, review, QA, ship, compound, investigate, plus technical writing, DevOps pipelines, database optimization, workflow mapping, and developer advocacy. TDD-first with subagent-driven development.

plugins.name: marketing-squad
plugins.description: Digital marketing operations: SEO audits, PPC strategy, social media, content planning, ad creative, tracking audits, paid media audits, AI citation, growth hacking, search query analysis, paid social, programmatic media, app store optimization, and video optimization.

plugins.name: sales-squad
plugins.description: Agency sales pipeline: outbound prospecting, discovery prep, deal strategy with MEDDPICC, proposals, pipeline review, account planning, technical demos, and Sales Engineer agent for pre-sales.

plugins.name: design-squad
plugins.description: Design system creation with starter templates, design review with AI slop detection, UX research with execution methodology, brand consistency checks, and AI image prompt engineering.

plugins.name: project-squad
plugins.description: Multi-client project management with NEXUS cross-squad orchestration, client context persistence, executive summaries, product strategy, analytics reporting, document generation, sprint planning, status reports, and retrospectives.

plugins.name: security-squad
plugins.description: Security audits (OWASP/STRIDE/supply chain), incident response, legal compliance (GDPR/CCPA/KVKK), performance benchmarks with load testing, browser automation, safety guardrails, and cross-AI code review.
